text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
How did I end up here? I really need to stop
daydreaming...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how thoughtless of me! I haven't greeted the
Three Goddesses yet.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm grateful for your guidance every day, and I
pray for everyone's health tomorrow as well.
